description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and a REPO_NAME variable. Include a before_script that creates the GOPATH src directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project directory into it, and cd's into that path. Define stages test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a format job that runs `go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, `go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`, and `go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)`. In the build stage add a compile job that runs `go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/mybinary` and publishes the resulting mybinary as an artifact. No caches, rules, or deployment steps are defined.
